element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic damage dealing against opponent worms
Understanding environmental manipulation and cover creation
Access to otherwise inaccessible terrain areas
Strategic weapon selection and situational application
Advanced hazard awareness and tactical placement

typical_relief_triggers: End of opponent's turn without damage taken
typical_tension_triggers: Opponent worm entering effective attack range
Low health status on active worm
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based with time-limited actions per turn; tension builds across opponent turns, releases when player gains control; sudden death mode intensifies late-game pacing

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Reinforcement crates appear randomly; thematic terrain variations (forest, Martian, beach, hell) signal environmental hazard differences

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic movement and standard weapons; single opponent worms with predictable positioning
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased opponent team density; introduction of advanced movement tools for accessing varied terrain; weapon scarcity forces tactical choices
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multiple active threats; resource competition; terrain heavily deformed limiting mobility; sudden death option creates time pressure
notable_spikes: First opponent team with optimized weapon strategy
Introduction of multiple simultaneous threats across different terrain elevations
Sudden death activation forcing aggressive positioning over defensive play

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels generated using alpha-numeric seeds with predefined object and landscape sets arranged into forest, Martian terrain, beach, and hell themes; creates environmental hazard variety without hand-designed sequences
Explosive weapon use deforms terrain creating cover and obstacles; deformation persists across turns forcing players to adapt positioning and approach
Terrain variation in thematic sets creates vertical gameplay; advanced tools (Bungee, Ninja Rope) required to exploit high ground and inaccessible areas
